body:
WE WON! | Friend --

We won the Nevada caucus! I'm so excited about this incredible moment for our team (almost as excited as Hillary!).

**Let's keep this going -- we've got a lot of work to do to win this nomination, and we just proved that together, we can accomplish anything:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ3NzY5MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzNDg4Mjk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Let's go!

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

\------Forwarded message------
From: Hillary Clinton
Subject: We won Nevada! Here’s what’s next:

Friend --

We won the Nevada caucuses. Thank you. This would not have happened without you.

I am so grateful for everything you've done to get us to this moment.

I'm on my way to Texas to officially kick off our next big push. South Carolina votes next weekend, and then on Super Tuesday, March 1st, people in more than a dozen states will vote or caucus -- and more than 800 delegates are at stake.

**[Chip in $1 right now to say you're with me for the next part of our fight.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ3NzY5MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzNDg4Mjk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

This might not fit in with the narrative, but this campaign is driven by people like you -- more than 750,000 donors, thousands of volunteers, and millions of people are doing the unrecognized but important work of talking to friends and family about why this campaign matters. You are seen, you are heard, and I will do everything I can to make you proud.

The choice in this primary might be tough for some, because the truth is, Senator Sanders and I agree on a basic premise: Wall Street, big banks, drug companies, and the like all have too much power and influence in our country.

But it's not enough just to want to take them on. If we were to stop those special interests in their tracks tomorrow, the indifference that caused the water crisis in Flint would still exist. Women would still be getting paid less than men for the same job. Racism would still hold people back. LGBT people would still be able to get married on Saturday and fired on Monday.

Americans are right to be angry. These injustices demand action from all of us.

No one can win these fights alone -- not even the President of the United States. It has to be the mission of our entire nation.

We're going to have to work together to win this nomination, win the presidency, and then together, we'll work to break down every barrier holding Americans back from reaching their full potential.

**With you on this team, we can do it. Stand with me. Chip in $1 right now:**
[ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ3NzY5MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzNDg4Mjk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Hillary

name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: The wind is at our backs
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
We should be very proud of what we accomplished today in Nevada. Just last month, the Clinton campaign said they were leading by 25 points in their internal polls. And the entrance polls show we won the Latino vote in Nevada by 8 points. We'll leave Nevada just a few delegates behind. That's huge momentum.
The wind is at our backs. And in the next month, there are 26 primaries and caucuses.
Our campaign is funded by more than 4 million individual contributions -- a tremendous number of working people giving small amounts of money to take on a campaign and super PACs funded by millionaires, billionaires, hedge funds, and Wall Street.
**[Your $3 contribution right now will help send a message that you're standing with Bernie, and that you can help him win.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-results?refcode=em160220jw "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-results?refcode=em160220jw")**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-results?refcode=em160220jw "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-results?refcode=em160220jw")**
Bernie said from the beginning that people should not underestimate us. That is true now more than ever.
Thank you for standing with Bernie.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016

\- February 20th, 2016 -
# **Thank You South Carolina!**
| Dear Peter, We have won our second primary in a row, with many more victories to come. I cannot thank you enough for your support. [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2Fcategory-s%2F111.htm&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=victorysupport&n=3) We have traveled all over the country and met so many incredible voters. The enthusiasm and momentum is amazing and it is so important we keep it going! Tuesday is the Nevada Caucus, and if you don't know your Caucus location you can visit [Donaldjtrump.com/nevada/caucus-finder/](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fnevada%2Fcaucus-finder%2F&e=29ce6606c18be1e206be794567856f81&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=victorysupport&n=3&test_email=1&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=victorysupport&n=4) to find out where you should be Tuesday night to show your support! Also, we are little over a week away from Super Tuesday and early voting has begun in Texas and Georgia - find your polling location at [DonaldJTrump.com/vote](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fvote&e=29ce6606c18be1e206be794567856f81&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=victorysupport&n=4&test_email=1&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=victorysupport&n=5) Thank you for your support- I could not do it without you! The silent majority is no longer silent. We will no longer be led by the all talk, no action politicians that have failed us all. Together, we are going to Make America Great Again. Best Wishes,
**Donald J. Trump**

P.S. Show your support with official Trump campaign merchandise: [http://shop.donaldjtrump.com](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=victorysupport&n=6)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: they wrote us off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46302484:6lU0MPrtN:m:1:1349778030:79FD1E180756288740ED4133E2709D84:r)
---
| | | | Peter, The results we got last night in South Carolina were amazing. My opponents and the media had written us off, but we showed them. **Conservatives want an optimistic nominee with a vision for the 21st Century. They want someone who can speak to all Americans, of all walks of life. They want a candidate who can beat Hillary Clinton. I 'm going to be that candidate.** But this race is very far from over -- it's down to a three-man race, but we have a lot of work to do. [**There 's no better time to join up with our movement -- will you chip in right now?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46302484:6lU0MPrtN:m:1:1349778030:79FD1E180756288740ED4133E2709D84:r) Last night in South Carolina, I talked about the stakes of this election: We cannot afford another eight years of failure. We need our generation to step up and assume the mantle of leadership. We know how to do this: When America was weakened just over a generation ago, Ronald Reagan led us back to the principles that made our country the freest and most prosperous in the world.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46302484:6lU0MPrtN:m:1:1349778030:79FD1E180756288740ED4133E2709D84:r)

The conservative movement today is one where a son of a bartender and a maid can be on the road to being president of the United States, where a daughter of Indian immigrants has helped South Carolina prosper like never before, where a South Carolinian who grew up in working poverty can become the first African-American senator from the South in more than a century.** [**If you want to be a part of that movement, and help us win this fall, take the next step with me -- lend your support right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46302484:6lU0MPrtN:m:1:1349778030:79FD1E180756288740ED4133E2709D84:r) Sincerely,Marco Rubio

name: ted@tedcruz.org
subject: they were wrong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
They said we couldn't win Iowa and we did. They said a conservative couldn't compete in New Hampshire, and we did -- proving the Washington pundits wrong. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33693679:stTVECCAN:m:1:1104269936:466DC4BFD92170C0A93EC1F68F456191:r)
---
Dear Friend,

They said we couldn't win Iowa, and we did.

They said a conservative couldn't compete in New Hampshire, and we did -- proving the Washington pundits wrong.

They threw everything they had at us in South Carolina -- from millions of dollars in ads to nasty personal attacks from my opponents, and we finished in a virtual tie for 2nd place.

With your help, we have proved the Washington establishment wrong again and again and again.

**Friend, I am the only candidate who has beaten Donald Trump, and I'm the only candidate who CAN beat Donald and win the nomination.**

The next two weeks are critical to our campaign. I'm going to need your help -- more than ever.

Here is what is immediately in front of us:

**February 23rd _\-- Nevada_

March 1st _\-- Alabama, Alaska, Arkansas, Colorado, Georgia, Massachusetts, Minnesota, Oklahoma, Tennessee, Texas, Vermont, Virginia, and Wyoming_

March 5th _\-- Kansas, Kentucky, Louisiana, and Maine_**

We have built a top-tier campaign organization on the ground in each of these states, but I need to get financial resources to them immediately.

That's where you come in.

With your immediate help, I can get much needed resources in the hands of our outstanding volunteers who are already on the ground.

**[Will you chip in at least $35 to keep our momentum going -- or if you can afford $100 or even $250 -- Heidi and I would be incredibly grateful.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33693679:stTVECCAN:m:1:1104269936:466DC4BFD92170C0A93EC1F68F456191:r)**

One more thing.

Republicans need a consistent conservative -- in both word and deed -- to beat Hillary Clinton and reverse the disasters of the Obama years.

I am that candidate.

**[With your immediate help -- I will have the resources to compete in the critical weeks to come.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33693679:stTVECCAN:m:1:1104269936:466DC4BFD92170C0A93EC1F68F456191:r)**

_Please do all you can._

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

Friend, I am the only candidate who has beaten Donald Trump, and I'm the only candidate who CAN beat Donald and win the nomination. The next two weeks are critical to our campaign. I'm going to need your help -- more than ever. Here is what is immediately in front of us: February 23rd \-- Nevada March 1st \-- Alabama, Alaska, Arkansas, Colorado, Georgia, Massachusetts, Minnesota, Oklahoma, Tennessee, Texas, Vermont, Virginia, and Wyoming March 5th \-- Kansas, Kentucky, Louisiana, and Maine We have built a top-tier campaign organization on the ground in each of these states, but I need to get financial resources to them immediately. That's where you come in. With your immediate help, I can get much needed resources in the hands of our outstanding volunteers who are already on the ground. One more thing. Republicans need a consistent conservative -- in both word and deed -- to beat Hillary Clinton and reverse the disasters of the Obama years. I am that candidate. Please do all you can. name: Ted Cruz
subject: With your help, we're going to win
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

We had an incredible
evening last night. Just as in Iowa and New Hampshire, we
energized and mobilized young people, conservatives, and Reagan
democrats to turn out in South Carolina.

When you put Iowa,
New Hampshire, and South Carolina together, two things are
happening. Number one, it's clear there is only one strong
conservative in this race who can win. And number two, for anyone
who believes that Donald Trump is not the right candidate to take
on Hillary Clinton in November, our campaign is the only campaign
that has beaten Donald Trump and can beat Donald Trump.

History has shown
that in order to win the Republican nomination, a candidate must
win one of the first three states. There are only two candidates
who have done so - Donald Trump and me. And 70% of Republicans
don't believe Donald is the right candidate to take on Hillary
Clinton in November. Now it is up to us to ensure we elect the
strongest conservative who can defeat Hillary.

From the very
beginning of this campaign, our goal was to do well in the first
four primary states and then go on to compete and win in the "SEC
Primary" states on Super Tuesday. Because of you, we're
accomplishing the first half of that goal, but now we're headed
into phase two.

As we take our
campaign into Nevada and Super Tuesday, we're in a great
position. We're in second place in the delegate count with a huge
number of delegates up for grabs on March 1st. Over 200,000
courageous conservatives across the nation have signed up to
volunteer with our campaign, and we are organized in all 56
states, territories, and the District of Columbia that send
delegates to the convention.

I want to thank you
for everything you've done so far. We wouldn't be where we are
today without your help, but we still have a long way to go.
We're in this for the long haul, and fighting alongside We the
People, we are going to win. So this is where I need you to
double down. In particular, I need your help calling your
friends, neighbors, and supporters across the country encouraging
them to turn out to #ChooseCruz. Please sign up to get started
right away here.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. It's all hands
on deck. In addition to making phone calls, there are numerous
other ways you can get started helping the campaign - please sign
up to get started now!

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

body:
Friend --

Things are heating up on the trail. I'm typing this on a laptop in the backseat of a car as we head to another campaign stop. Later today, I'm going to meet with the campaign team to talk about our budget. We're making our final plans for the stretch before the primary.

The goals and deadlines we email you about are real. And they matter. That's why we've set a goal of raising $5,000 for our Voter Outreach Fund before midnight tomorrow. Can we count on you -- right now?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20160221&refcode2=e20160221nd&amount=5

If we fall short, that means we have to make hard choices about where to cut back. That might mean fewer ads on TV, or fewer voters we can reach through the mail, or on the phone, or at their doors. And that has a real impact. Make no mistake: Those cuts could cost us the election.

This race is close. Each dollar we raise today goes a long way to ensure Katie wins this primary. Can Katie count on you, right now, for a $5 donation?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20160221&refcode2=e20160221nd&amount=5

When I meet with Katie after today's campaign event, I want to tell her we can go big before the primary. But I can't do that without your help. So what will it be? Chip in whatever you can now >>

Jordyn

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: The Latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)
**Memo:** Update from the Trail
**From:** Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager

**Down to 1 Governor:**

_**We're Entering the Final Four and John Kasich Won the Governors' Bracket**_**:** South Carolina's results have further narrowed the Republican contest, leaving only one with a chance of beating Hillary Clinton and winning the White House - John Kasich. Executive experience matters. Two polls released last week show that in a head-to-head matchup, John Kasich would soundly defeat Hillary Clinton.

_**John Kasich 's Positive Approach is Prevailing**_**:** Importantly, Gov. Kasich has only added to his momentum since New Hampshire, despite some doubting his ability to compete in South Carolina. Other candidates and their allies have spent $30 to $80 million more than Kasich - including millions attacking him - but have little or nothing to show for it. Gov. Kasich's commitment to a positive, inclusive, forward-looking approach and vision for our country is connecting with voters despite the greater resources of his rivals and their negative attacks.

**Huge Crowds in Michigan, Massachusetts & Vermont:**

While campaigning this week in Michigan, South Carolina, Massachusetts and Vermont, our crowd sizes continue to grow as more Americans have the opportunity to hear John Kasich's positive message for America. They like what they're hearing and our support is growing every day.

****
New Poll of Nat'l Sec. Experts - John Kasich Most Prepared to Serve:****

Foreign Policy Magazine: This snap poll - conducted by the Teaching, Research & International Policy (TRIP) project at the College of William & Mary, in collaboration with Foreign Policy - asked IR scholars 10 questions about contemporary international issues. This poll is the eighth in the series and includes responses from 701 of the 4,078 IR scholars currently teaching and/or researching at colleges and universities throughout the United States.

At 54 percent, the majority of scholars chose Ohio Governor John Kasich, followed by former Florida Governor Jeb Bush, who garnered the support of just under 30 percent of respondents. Interestingly, no other Republican candidate broke out of single digits with IR scholars. Despite strong support in national and state public opinion polls, just 1.7 percent of IR scholars selected real estate mogul Donald Trump, while 1.5 percent selected Sen. Ted Cruz. ([read more here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33696059:sKhA7CCNc:m:1:958431888:773A1D402A9AD291A28083C2D529674C:r))

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33696059:sKhA7CCNc:m:1:958431888:773A1D402A9AD291A28083C2D529674C:r)
**CNN Town Hall:**
Gov. John Kasich participated in a live Town Hall event hosted by CNN. If you have the time, this is a must-watch:

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33696060:sKhA7CCNc:m:1:958431888:773A1D402A9AD291A28083C2D529674C:r)

**Volunteer in Michigan:**
The Michigan Primary is on Tuesday, March 8th. Are you able to travel to Michigan to help John Kasich? Plans are currently underway to mobilize volunteers to focus on grassroots outreach and talking with Michigan voters. Mark your calendars for volunteer deployment opportunities in Michigan from March 4 through March 8th.

**If you are interested in traveling to Michigan please email:** Michigan@JohnKasich.com and be sure to include your cell phone number. A member of our team will follow up with additional details.

clean_body: www.JohnKasich.com Memo: Update from the Trail From: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager Down to 1 Governor: We're Entering the Final Four and John Kasich Won the Governors' Bracket: South Carolina's results have further narrowed the Republican contest, leaving only one with a chance of beating Hillary Clinton and winning the White House - John Kasich. Executive experience matters. Two polls released last week show that in a head-to-head matchup, John Kasich would soundly defeat Hillary Clinton. John Kasich 's Positive Approach is Prevailing: Importantly, Gov. Kasich has only added to his momentum since New Hampshire, despite some doubting his ability to compete in South Carolina. Other candidates and their allies have spent $30 to $80 million more than Kasich - including millions attacking him - but have little or nothing to show for it. Gov. Kasich's commitment to a positive, inclusive, forward-looking approach and vision for our country is connecting with voters despite the greater resources of his rivals and their negative attacks. Huge Crowds in Michigan, Massachusetts & Vermont: While campaigning this week in Michigan, South Carolina, Massachusetts and Vermont, our crowd sizes continue to grow as more Americans have the opportunity to hear John Kasich's positive message for America. They like what they're hearing and our support is growing every day. ** New Poll of Nat'l Sec. Experts - John Kasich Most Prepared to Serve: Foreign Policy Magazine: This snap poll - conducted by the Teaching, Research & International Policy (TRIP) project at the College of William & Mary, in collaboration with Foreign Policy - asked IR scholars 10 questions about contemporary international issues. This poll is the eighth in the series and includes responses from 701 of the 4,078 IR scholars currently teaching and/or researching at colleges and universities throughout the United States. At 54 percent, the majority of scholars chose Ohio Governor John Kasich, followed by former Florida Governor Jeb Bush, who garnered the support of just under 30 percent of respondents. Interestingly, no other Republican candidate broke out of single digits with IR scholars. Despite strong support in national and state public opinion polls, just 1.7 percent of IR scholars selected real estate mogul Donald Trump, while 1.5 percent selected Sen. Ted Cruz. body:
This team won Nevada!! | Friend --

WE WON THE NEVADA CAUCUS!

With nine days left until Super Tuesday, we’re being outraised and outspent in key states, but this team showed exactly what we’re capable of in Nevada yesterday, and I know we can do it again.

**[Can you chip in $1 to the Super Tuesday Fund now to help Hillary win on March 1st?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ3NzkxNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzNTg3NTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We all know what’s at stake in this election, from the Affordable Care Act to marriage equality. Hillary is fighting to protect and build on President Obama’s progress -- but Bernie Sanders says President Obama shows “a presidential leadership gap” and thinks we ought to start over with big fights that could drag on for years. President Obama worked with a tough opposition Congress to make compromises and score some big wins -- that’s how governing works, and that’s exactly what Hillary will do as president.

**Hillary will be the president we need, but right now, she needs our help to win this nomination. Chip in $1 to the Super Tuesday Fund right now, and let’s make sure our next president can protect and build on all the progress we’ve made:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ3NzkxNTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQzNTg3NTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
